items.title: Compromised jscrambler 8.14.0 npm Release Drops Rust Infostealer During Install
items.summary: The jscrambler npm package was compromised, and simply installing its 8.14.0 release runs an infostealer on your machine. Published on July 11, 2026, the malicious version carries a preinstall hook th...
